# Remote Server Usage

Get api key from the remote server by following this:

- sign up here: `https://hana-i18n.198.23.164.177.sslip.io/docs#tag/auth-accounts/POST/api/auth-accounts/create-with-email`
- sign in here: `https://hana-i18n.198.23.164.177.sslip.io/docs#tag/auth-sessions/POST/api/auth-sessions/create-with-email-sign-in`

- get your user id here: `https://hana-i18n.198.23.164.177.sslip.io/docs#tag/auth-sessions/GET/api/auth-sessions/who-am-i`

example for this one, the user id is `cm9cmjheo0007ughiliyj0g8y`
![get user Id](./user-id.png)


- get organization id here: `https://hana-i18n.198.23.164.177.sslip.io/docs#tag/organizations/GET/api/organizations`

example for this one, the organization id is `cm9cmjheo000aughi21bcmhua`
![get organization id](./organization-id.png)

- get project id here: `https://hana-i18n.198.23.164.177.sslip.io/docs#tag/projects/GET/api/projects`

example for this one, the project id is `cm9cmjheo000bughi1eo22sf1`
![get project id](./project-id.png)


- create api key here: `https://hana-i18n.198.23.164.177.sslip.io/docs#tag/api-keys/POST/api/api-keys`

example for this one, the api key is `eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Ea_TDMrqFP7YY4OU2PmXRsEirIE0jTOqw6_S5iHOKvU`
![create api key](./api-key.png)


now you can use the api key to translate, as for the base url, use : `https://hana-i18n.198.23.164.177.sslip.io`
